name: Aguaro
description: Aguaro offers SaaS solutions integrated with ServiceNow to help companies automate the management of their environmental impact and reduce their carbon footprint. It streamlines hardware inventory retrieval and presents the data through intuitive dashboards.

name: Antarctica
description: Antarctica is a real time observability platform for monitoring the carbon emissions of your on-premise and cloud infrastructure, IT hardware assets and websites. It can also provide optimization recommendations.

name: CarbonDB
description: CarbonDB collects and consolidates energy usage data from multiple sources within a company, providing a unified view of energy consumption. It accurately converts energy usage into carbon emissions, enabling precise tracking of a company's carbon footprint.

name: fruggr
description: fruggr is a platform for collecting, managing and optimizing the environmental footprint of your cloud & on-prem infrastructure, digital workplaces, IT assets, websites, applications and more.

name: Resilio Tech
description: Resilio Tech is a solution for assessing the environmental footprint of your digital products and services, whether it is an information system, website, or satellite.

name: Sopht
description: Sopht is a platform for collecting, managing and optimizing the environmental footprint of your cloud & on-prem infrastructure, digital workplaces, IT assets, websites, applications and more.

name: Verdikt
description: Verdikt is a platform for assessing your sustainable IT maturity and track its performance.
